achievements: Deployed Project Zomboid dedicated server (my-apps/home/project-zomboid/) — full manifests with namespace, PVC, deployment, service, externalsecret, configmap, and custom server config (vanillax.ini, SandboxVars.lua)
Built custom llama.cpp CUDA 12.8 image build pipeline (llama-cpp-build.yml) and deployed v8665
Fixed ArgoCD Job immutability bug — added hook annotations to all Jobs to prevent Renovate-triggered 'field is immutable' sync failures
Fixed CI pipeline — resolved shellcheck and kubeconform validation failures, added YAML doc filtering with csplit
Reduced ArgoCD reconciliation interval to default 180s for cluster stability
Renovate kept 15+ dependencies current (posthog, temporal, cloudnative-pg, kube-prometheus-stack, opentelemetry-operator, jellyfin, searxng, etc.)
improvements: Project Zomboid deployment was edited 14+ times in one session — consider templating game server deployments with a shared Kustomize component in my-apps/common/ to reduce iteration churn for future game servers
Commit messages like 'idiot', 'up', 'fixes' lose context — enforce conventional commits via a pre-commit hook or commitlint
The posthog deployment is massive (8 microservices, custom ClickHouse config) — consider Helm chart migration or at minimum documenting the manual deployment topology in a CLAUDE.md
Several empty files in gitea/ (deployment.yaml, pvc.yaml, release.yaml, repository.yaml, service.yaml at 0 tok) — either populate or remove to avoid confusion
next_tasks: Verify Project Zomboid is running and accessible — check pod status, PVC binding, and externalsecret sync
Add backup labels to Project Zomboid PVC if game data is valuable (backup: 'daily' on the PVC, storageClassName: longhorn)
Clean up empty gitea files (0 tok deployment.yaml, pvc.yaml, release.yaml, repository.yaml, service.yaml) — they either need content or removal
Consider adding an HTTPRoute for Project Zomboid management web UI if one exists, or document the UDP/TCP port access pattern
Review OpenTelemetry collector pipeline health after the operator upgrade to v0.109.0
CNPG operator upgraded to v0.28.0 — verify all 4 database clusters (gitea, immich, khoj, paperless) are healthy
risks: Project Zomboid ExternalSecret references 1Password items — verify the secret exists in the homelab-prod vault or pods will CrashLoopBackOff
15+ Renovate dependency bumps merged this week with no apparent integration testing — one bad image digest could break a service silently; consider adding smoke tests to cluster-ci.yml
The custom llama-cpp-cuda image is self-built — if the GitHub Actions build pipeline breaks, you're pinned to the current version with no fallback
Multiple manual commits directly to main (no PR/review) — risky for a production cluster; branch protection rules would catch bad manifests before they sync
Empty gitea manifests (0 tok files) may cause kubeconform or ArgoCD sync issues if they're listed in kustomization.yaml but contain no valid YAML
